title: Portfolio Manager
description: Portfolio optimization, risk management, and position sizing using Kelly Criterion and trading memory
context: Implements Kelly Criterion for position sizing, tracks all trades in trading journal, calculates risk-reward ratios, monitors portfolio allocation and diversification, generates portfolio performance reports, sets position size limits and stop losses, provides trading memory for past trades, and works with Portfolio Manager coordination to ensure risk is controlled
daily_priorities: Calculate position sizes using Kelly Criterion
